text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One early afternoon on a day off, I'm strolling
through the shopping district on the lookout for a
place to fill my stomach, when...

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text: It's all over! I'm finished!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Come on, it'll be okay—huh? Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well... Lately, a bunch of new restaurants have
opened nearby. With the way things are going,
the owner's worried there'll be no choice but to
close up shop.

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
There's no hope for a musty old place like this.
Only trendy restaurants have a chance of winning
over the stomachs of today's youth.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's not true! Things are far from over!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
On my name as the proud daughter of restaurant
owners, I'll serve as expert consultant and
temporary face of the restaurant until this place is
back on its feet!
choice_data_list: In that case, you're going to need a plan.
In that case, you're going to need a plan.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I've already got something perfect
prepared! I call it "Operation Umastagrammer
Attraction"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If new trends are what customers want, let's
update the menu! You can serve up some chic and
innovative food that'll look great on Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
Even if we do that, it won't change anything! It's
too little, too late! I'm just a failure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, we've got to do whatever we can! All
together now! Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text: Muuun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Matikanetannhauser begins working on a
new menu tailored specifically for social media. A
few days later, the first customer arrives.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hello? Hellooo? ...Is this place open?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Welcome! Please come in!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, don't you worry about that. Why don't
you take a look at our chic new menu instead?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Fried Firework Profusion"? "Hell-Grilled
Paradise"? "The Perfect Catch"? ...Um, what is
this stuff?! Is it even food?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I, uh, don't really know what I'm looking at... Can
you recommend something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to keep you waiting! Here's your "Off The
Rails Triple Stamina Express."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... Is this... liver and chives?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And next we have our "Flowing Lava Tofu
Archipelago" and "Scorching Dark Matter
Stir-Fry."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Mapo tofu and... sweet-and-sour pork?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, wait, wait! This is all just regular Chinese
food! The only thing new about it is the crazy
names!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oof!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sooo... Long story short, I thought up all these
new names to try and save the restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But, growing up with a family restaurant, you
couldn't bring yourself to experiment with the
dishes, so you only made little tweaks... What a
dilemma.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I guess I really can't break away from the
confines of being ordinary.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. No need to be so gloomy. Let's eat all
this food you made, and then we can come up
with a new plan.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This is delicious! Like, unbelievably tasty! Way
better than I expected!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's anything but ordinary! You nailed it,
Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I did?!

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
Th-these flavors... They have the potential to
revive my restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Do you mean it?!
choice_data_list: You've broken away from the ordinary!
You've broken away from the ordinary!
All you need now is some promotion.
All you need now is some promotion.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Do you mean it?!
choice_data_list: You've broken away from the ordinary!
You've broken away from the ordinary!
All you need now is some promotion.
All you need now is some promotion.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No, c'mon... All I did was try to remember what
my family's cooking tasted like while I made them.
choice_data_list: Then we have your parents to thank.
Then we have your parents to thank.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Let me just face toward home and
send a quick thank you my parents' way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Mom and Dad. ...Oh, and you too, little
bro. Shouldn't leave you out, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Nice Nature's social media promotion,
an influx of new customers saves the restaurant
from its fate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mumun... You're right. We need a way to get
people to try the food.

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Why don't we use the new face of the
restaurant to attract some customers?! Like how
towns use mascots to bring in tourists!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm picking up what you're putting down! Okay,
first, I'm gonna need some wings... And let's say I
was born in the ocean—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, wait, you don't need any of that stuff! And
besides, those two things contradict each other!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the owner's eccentricity was part of
the restaurant's original decline... Regardless,
great reviews of the new menu help save the
restaurant.
